title: FG calculus bridge
summary: Transfers a certified FG normal-form Laplacian model into the abstract ambient Calculus and AlgebraicIdentities interfaces used by tangentiality and GJMS code.

mathematicalContent.heading: Bridge between interfaces
mathematicalContent.body: Given normal ambient data A and a NormalLaplacianModel L, toCalculus packages the same straight data, dimension, Q, X, and Δ̃ as an Operators.Calculus. FG_algebraicIdentities then copies the certified laws of L into the AlgebraicIdentities structure.

mathematicalContent.heading: Logical status
mathematicalContent.body: This is a verified interface conversion, not a geometric derivation. It shows that any supplied L satisfying the FG model laws can be consumed by the existing abstract operator theory.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: This definition constructs the abstract ambient calculus by reusing A's straight form and L's n, X, and Δ̃, with Q fixed to Q_A = 2ρt².
correspondence.leanType: def toCalculus (A : NormalAmbientData Conf) (L : NormalLaplacianModel A) : Operators.Calculus Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The Q field of the converted calculus is definitionally the normal-form function Q_A.
correspondence.leanType: theorem toCalculus_Q (A : NormalAmbientData Conf) (L : NormalLaplacianModel A) : (A.toCalculus L).Q = normalQ A

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The Laplacian accessor of the converted calculus acts exactly as the model's supplied Laplacian.
correspondence.leanType: theorem toCalculus_lap (A : NormalAmbientData Conf) (L : NormalLaplacianModel A) (f : Operators.Function Conf) : (A.toCalculus L).lap f = L.laplacian f

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Every certified NormalLaplacianModel yields an AlgebraicIdentities witness for the converted calculus by transferring its six law fields.
correspondence.leanType: theorem FG_algebraicIdentities (A : NormalAmbientData Conf) (L : NormalLaplacianModel A) : (A.toCalculus L).AlgebraicIdentities

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: This is an alias of FG_algebraicIdentities using the target name expected by the first-stage ambient operator architecture.
correspondence.leanType: theorem straightForm_instantiates_AlgebraicIdentities (A : NormalAmbientData Conf) (L : NormalLaplacianModel A) : (A.toCalculus L).AlgebraicIdentities

references.note: Geometric motivation for the identities transferred by this bridge.

limitations: The bridge is Lean-verified, but it assumes a completed NormalLaplacianModel. It does not construct such a model from a concrete ambient metric or prove any of its analytic and differential-geometric laws.
